# signInOneTimeToken

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for signInOneTimeToken

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSignInOneTimeTokenMutation(); mutate({ input: { token: '<String>', credentialKind: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useSignInOneTimeTokenMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSignInOneTimeTokenMutation();
mutate({ input: { token: '<String>', credentialKind: '<String>' } });
```
